units.lean_file_body:
theorem fps_invertible_iff_constantCoeff_field {K : Type*} [Field K] (a : PowerSeries K) :
    IsUnit a ↔ constantCoeff a ≠ 0 := by
  rw [fps_invertible_iff_constantCoeff, isUnit_iff_ne_zero]
notes: Uses prior project lemma fps_invertible_iff_constantCoeff and the field fact that an element is a unit iff nonzero.
